Params: {3: 'The first thing she feels is a cold that cuts straight to the bone.'}
{3: 'It\'s night in the valley. Every breath turns into mist in front of her.'}
{3: 'Thin white fog hangs everywhere. Distant trees and rocks blur together, forming faint ghostlike shapes under the moonlight.'}
{3: 'When Alpha comes to, she realizes she\'s already here.'}
{3: 'She tries to speak, but only a harsh, hoarse rasp comes out.'}
{3: 'A faint drip. She feels something wrong in her hand—something she recognizes.'}
{3: 'She raises it. Red fills her sight. Blood.'}
{3: 'Red lightning flickers across her blood-soaked left hand. Pain clings to her as the Punishing Virus stirs and scrapes at her M.I.N.D.'}
{3: 'She looks at both hands and realizes her body has changed.'}
{3: 'Footsteps come from behind, and Alpha turns to look.'}
{3: 'It\'s a human figure she doesn\'t recognize, yet somehow knows all too well.'}
{3: 'You look exhausted, as if every step takes everything you have. But you still move forward, steady and unstoppable.'}
{3: 'You step out of the fog, and Alpha finally sees you clearly.'}
{3: 'She sees eyes full of cold hatred, and a body heavily rebuilt with cybernetics.'}
{3: 'Your right hand grips the Pyro Katana. Your left hand holds a compact SMG from your composite gear. A firearm case rests on your back, and two Levi-Guns hang over your shoulders.'}
{3: 'The words leave you in a low, flat voice, almost emotionless.'}
{3: 'Meanwhile, on a distant hillside, figures emerge from the dense trees. Weapons in hand, they move in unison, their fierce battle spirit breaking the stillness of the cold night.'}
{3: 'They surge toward Alpha at full speed. The ground trembles under their charge.'}
{3: 'Suddenly, a Construct\'s roar rips through the night. Like a signal flare, it lights the silence on fire.'}
{3: 'Gunshots, shouts, cannon fire, the whine of leg engines... Every sound erupts at once, blending into a roaring flood.'}
{3: 'Numerous transport aircraft appear in the distance. Their high beams spear through the fog and turn the valley bright as day. Ropes drop. A third wave of Constructs starts assembling.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Alpha tightens her grip. A string of battle plans flashes through her mind.'}
{3: 'The fog around her quietly thins. Only then does Alpha realize she\'s standing in a heap of shattered Construct bodies.'}
{3: 'Broken blades and snapped swords lie scattered across the corpses. Others are stuck upright in the ground, soaked crimson with vital fluid.'}
{2: 'Alpha, this is the end of the line for you.', 3: '94', 8: '2'}
{3: 'Darkness hits. Alpha drops into a bottomless abyss.'}
{3: 'From the dark, a vivid kaleidoscope blooms. Fragmented scenes rush past her and warp as they cross her vision.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'They look like pieces of her past, twisted so badly they barely feel like her own memories.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'A voice echoes up from far below.'}
{3: 'The warped space around her starts stitching itself into familiar colors, building a scene in front of her.'}
{3: 'She sees F.O.S. College, the way it used to be.'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'This illusion... is it the Punishing Virus?', 4: '1', 18: '100016996'}
{3: 'Pain still lingers in her M.I.N.D. Alpha forces the stirring virus back down.'}
{3: 'She steps outside. A bright red streak cuts the horizon. Warm sunlight quickly gilds the mountains and sea, and the morning mist fades away.'}
{3: 'Alpha can feel it. Something is calling her from the old F.O.S. site.'}
{2: 'Surface, Former F.O.S. Military Command College, Prism Square.'}
{3: 'You check the Punishing Virus detector again, confirm the reading, then lower it.'}
{3: 'The Mist incident is over. The F.O.S. starship has returned to Babylonia.'}
{3: 'To secure the area and prevent surprises, Babylonia sends teams to sweep the former college grounds and set up multiple virus monitoring stations.'}
{3: 'You move through the silent square. Afternoon light stretches the shadows of broken walls. Everything feels asleep, except for the wind\'s howl and the pointless cries of a few Corrupted.'}
{3: 'The monitors show nothing abnormal, but a vague sense of wrongness refuses to go away.'}
{3: 'The Corrupted wander as if guided, always circling the exact center of the square. They even swing at empty air, attacking something you can\'t see.'}
{2: '(There aren\'t many ahead. Your retreat route is already planned.)', 3: '172'}
{1: '1', 3: 'You decide to test the situation and gather intel. You raise your sidearm and aim at a Corrupted in the distance.'}
{3: 'The shot punches through its head and destroys its core. It collapses like a puppet with its strings cut.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Drawn by the sounds, two more Corrupted charge toward you, one from a corner, one from the shadows.'}
{3: 'Same numbers. Same positions. Just like your earlier scan.'}
{3: 'Your thoughts keep moving, but your hands stay steady.'}
{3: 'Two quick shots. One Corrupted drops the moment it stumbles out from the corner.'}
{3: 'Just as the echo of the gunshots fades...'}
{3: 'Something tears in from far away, grinding over gravel and debris. It threads through broken buildings, clears obstacles, and charges straight into Prism Square against the sunlight.'}
{3: 'It\'s a striking red motorcycle. The rider has twin horns like a demon.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'It kicks up dust, carves a wide arc across the ground, and stops. A tall figure swings off the bike.'}
{3: 'Surprise flashes in Alpha\'s eyes, then her usual sharp focus returns.'}
{3: 'The last Corrupted drops low, then springs forward with a screech.'}
{3: 'Alpha draws her dagger and lunges. The blade cuts upward, splitting the Corrupted in two. It crashes down as scrap metal.'}
{3: 'She sheathes the dagger and walks back toward you.'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Why are you here? Did you see that illusion too?', 4: '1', 18: '100016999'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Something... I\'m not certain of, is calling for me from here.', 4: '1', 18: '100017000'}
{3: 'Alpha studies you, remembering your modified appearance from that illusion. She shakes her head.'}
{3: 'A ghostlike whisper slips in from behind you.'}
{3: 'You both turn fast, tracking the voice.'}
{3: 'In the center of the square, everything looks normal at first, but in the next instant the entire space seems to freeze.'}
{3: 'Like invisible glass pushed from the inside, the space tightens and tightens, paling as it reaches the edge of shattering.'}
{3: 'Then it splinters fast, spiderwebbing outward. The sound goes from a low rumble to a sharp, brittle crack.'}
{3: 'Space itself is breaking. A black rift opens out of nowhere.'}
{3: 'White mist pours out, rolling over rubble, flooding the ground, rising past your ankles.'}
{3: 'A blood-red left hand reaches out from inside and clamps onto the edge.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Alpha draws her dagger, steps forward, and shields you.'}
{3: 'Another hand tears through. Both arms wrench the rift wider.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'A figure steps through the mist and warped light, entering this world.'}
{3: 'She flexes her wrist. Silver hair lifts. Chaotic crimson burns in her eyes.'}
{3: 'Through the mist, you can make out shapes behind her. Countless Hetero-Creatures and Corrupted howl in the dark.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'You and Alpha recognize her instantly. It\'s Alpha\'s old frame, but changed. It gives off a chilling aura of chaos.'}
{3: 'Her gaze sweeps past you and locks onto Alpha. Her mouth twists into a cruel smile.'}
{2: '???', 3: 'Switched to a new frame, I see? It\'s better this way.', 4: '2', 18: '100017008'}
{2: '???', 3: 'I like those horns on your forehead. They\'ll look perfect on me.', 4: '2', 18: '100017009'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Dark crimson lightning sparks in her hand, laced with the Punishing Virus.'}
{2: '???', 3: 'I am the path you never took, the probability you forsook. I am...', 4: '1', 18: '100017011'}
{3: 'Before she can finish, she swings. It\'s too fast to track. A curved wave of red lightning slices through the air.'}
{3: 'It\'s like a command. Behind her, the rift spills open and a flood of monsters pours out, rushing straight at you and Alpha.'}
{3: 'Alpha tightens her grip on the dagger. Crimson virus energy flares around her hand. She slashes once, sending her own blade wave forward.'}
{3: 'The two arcs collide midair and explode. Shockwaves and debris spray across the square.'}
{3: 'A barrage of bullets rains forth, precisely striking the approaching Hetero-Creatures.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'The first shot pierces its left eye. The second tears its open throat. The third punches up from the jaw and blows away half its head.'}
{3: 'It collapses. The Hetero-Creatures behind it stampede over the body and grind it into scraps.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Alpha\'s right hand finds the hilt at her waist. She lowers her stance. The ground cracks under her feet. '}
{1: '1', 3: 'In the next instant, she becomes a red blur and drives straight into the monster tide.', 22: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'A half-moon sweep of deep crimson flashes out. The Corrupted and Hetero-Creatures in front split in two before they can even scream.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Alpha holds the line like a boulder in a flood, stopping the monsters by sheer force.'}
{3: 'She looks past the chaos, straight at Shadow in the back.'}
{3: 'Shadow ignores the provocation. Her arms crossed, she is relaxed like this is entertainment.'}
{3: 'But her eyes never leave Alpha. She studies her every swing, every step, every movement.'}
{3: 'Alpha\'s new frame clearly surprises Shadow. That\'s why she doesn\'t join the fight herself. Not yet.'}
{3: 'Her left hand rests lightly on the hilt behind her waist.'}
{2: 'Shadow', 3: 'Enough observation. Time to test you myself.', 4: '1', 18: '100017017'}
{3: 'In a blink, she\'s gone from where she stood.'}
{3: 'A streak, barely visible, tears through the air and cuts straight toward Alpha.'}
{3: 'Anything in her path gets sliced in half, Corrupted or Hetero-Creature alike.'}
{3: 'Their blades collide with a thunderous crash, sending shockwaves outward and cracking the stone tiles underfoot.'}
{3: 'Alpha holds her crimson blade in a reverse grip. "Shadow\'s" dagger locks against it, grinding hard. Sparks burst where the edges meet.'}
{2: 'Shadow', 3: 'I already told you. I\'m your shadow.', 4: '1', 18: '100017021'}
{3: 'Before the words even leave her lips, both fighters vanish from where they stood.'}
{3: 'A rapid burst of blade clashes erupts, so fast they\'re almost impossible to tell apart.'}
{3: 'Two figures weave and split across the square, colliding again and again. Every clash throws out a visible ring of shockwaves.'}
{3: 'The Corrupted and Hetero-Creatures pull back at Shadow\'s command. The slow ones get caught in the crossfire and shredded.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Alpha\'s strikes are ruthless and precise. Every cut goes for the kill.'}
{3: 'No wasted motion. No wasted strength. Each swing feels like a death sentence.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Shadow is just as lethal, but there\'s something unhinged in her rhythm.'}
{3: 'She fights like she doesn\'t care about getting hurt. She trades damage for damage, forcing Alpha to adjust on the fly.'}
{3: 'Alpha sweeps backhand and knocks Shadow\'s blade aside, then dashes forward. Her next slash shoots upward toward Shadow\'s neck.'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'But you\'re only a shadow at best.', 4: '2', 18: '100017023'}
{3: 'Shadow leans back. The blade nearly grazes her nose. She twists with the motion and drives a kick into Alpha.'}
{2: 'Shadow', 3: 'As expected of my chosen vessel! I wonder what other surprises you have to show for.', 4: '1', 18: '100017024'}
{3: 'Alpha blocks with her knee. The impact hits like a heavy drumbeat.'}
{3: 'The recoil throws them apart. Both slide back.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Shadow\'s mouth curls into a near-manic smile.'}
{3: 'Then her body jerks, her face contorting in agony.'}
{3: 'Her abdomen turns faint and translucent. The edges of her body start dissolving into mist.'}
{3: 'With a wave of her hand, the few remaining Corrupted and Hetero-Creatures vanish into the rift behind her.'}
{2: 'Shadow', 3: 'I think I\'m done playing with you for now.', 4: '1', 18: '100017029'}
{3: 'Behind her, the rift begins to shrink.'}
{3: 'Alpha kicks off the ground and shoots forward like an arrow. Her blade swings up from below.'}
{3: 'Shadow backsteps to dodge, feints to force Alpha back, then turns and sprints for the rift.'}
{3: 'Alpha\'s blade follows close, thrusting straight for Shadow\'s back.'}
{3: 'You flank from the side and fire in rapid bursts, trying to cut off her escape.'}
{3: 'All three reach the rift\'s edge at nearly the same time.'}
{3: 'Shadow\'s aura erupts. She spins around and blocks both Alpha\'s slash and your shots.'}
{3: 'Alpha\'s strike gets knocked aside with a sharp ring. Shadow rolls her blade through the motion. Your bullets skim the spine with a metallic ping.'}
{2: 'Shadow', 3: 'Keep that body safe for me. I\'ll come back for it.', 4: '1', 18: '100017033'}
{3: 'Shadow steps back and grips the long sword at her waist. Crimson electricity coils around her as the blade slides free.'}
{3: 'Alpha withdraws her dagger. Its mechanical components shift, and the short blade transforms into a long one.'}
{3: 'The Punishing Virus gathers around Alpha. Her blade flares bright red. Then she swings, hard and clean.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'The two forces collide head-on. A shockwave detonates from the impact point. The air screams as it tears.'}
{3: 'The powerful attacks collide without canceling out. The energy twists into a violent torrent and smashes into the rift\'s edge.'}
{3: 'The rift swells suddenly, then collapses inward.'}
{3: 'Sound and sight peel away. Everything turns pure white.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'The instant it expands, Alpha spins and throws herself in front of you.'}
{3: 'Her voice gets swallowed by the roar. Her hands miss you. She can\'t grab you in time.'}
{3: 'The square falls silent again. The monsters dissolve into mist. And then, all three of you vanish without a trace.'}
